info.name: Slopify Music API
info.description: Postman collection for the FastAPI backend mounted at https://web-production-4b492.up.railway.app.

request.description: Enhance a raw music idea into a better generation prompt.

response.name: 200 OK

originalRequest.description: Enhance a raw music idea into a better generation prompt.
Enhance a raw music idea into a better generation prompt.

request.description: Generate song lyrics from a user prompt.

response.name: 200 OK

originalRequest.description: Generate song lyrics from a user prompt.

response.body:
{
  "lyrics": "[Verse 1]
Streetlights fade into the blue
I miss the last train back to you
Neon rain across the glass
A quiet city rushing past",
  "model": "gpt-5.4-mini"
}

originalRequest.description: Generate song lyrics from a user prompt.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Midnight Drive",
  "prompt": "neon synthwave production with pulsing bass, gated drums, and a wide cinematic chorus",
  "lyrics": "City lights blur in the rearview glow\nI keep chasing echoes down an empty road\nEvery signal fades but I still hear your name\nMidnight keeps on driving me through the same old flame",
  "music_length_ms": 90000,
  "model_id": "music_v1",
  "force_instrumental": false,
  "respect_sections_durations": false,
  "user_id": null
}

request.description: Generate a song from a prompt, optionally with separate `lyrics`. Provide exactly one of `prompt` or `composition_plan`.

response.name: 201 Created

request.description: Generate a song from a composition plan. Do not send `force_instrumental` with this shape.

response.name: 201 Created

originalRequest.description: Generate a song from a composition plan. Do not send `force_instrumental` with this shape.

response.body:
{
  "id": "6d1c8a0b-5fe4-4d84-a7a7-7e6e6e8f5d80",
  "user_id": null,
  "title": "Midnight Drive",
  "prompt": null,
  "lyrics": null,
  "composition_plan": {
    "style": "uplifting progressive house",
    "sections": [
      {
        "name": "intro",
        "duration_ms": 15000,
        "description": "filtered pads and soft kick"
      },
      {
        "name": "drop",
        "duration_ms": 30000,
        "description": "wide supersaws and energetic bass"
      }
    ]
  },
  "model_id": "music_v1",
